title: 3 Insane Facts About Octopuses

segments.text: An octopus has three hearts, nine brains, and blue blood.
And it only gets weirder from here.
Two of those hearts pump blood straight to the gills.
The third pumps it through the body, but it stops every time the octopus swims.
That's why they would rather crawl. Swimming literally exhausts them.
Their blood is blue because it carries oxygen using copper instead of iron.
And nine brains, because each arm basically thinks for itself.
Follow for more facts that sound fake but are one hundred percent real.

description: An octopus has 3 hearts, 9 brains and BLUE blood. Nature is built different. Follow for daily facts that sound fake but are 100% real!
